request.description:
Get paginated list of giveaways. Use status query parameter to filter (DRAFT, ACTIVE, COMPLETED).

When status=ACTIVE:
вҖў Returns detailed stats for each giveaway:
  - totalRevenue: Sum of COMPLETED orders
  - totalSales: Count of COMPLETED orders
  - salesProgress: Percentage (0-100%)
  - totalEmails: Count of unique customer emails
  - dailyAverageSales: totalSales / days_since_created
  - conversionRate: (totalSales / totalTickets) * 100
вҖў Returns recent 3 purchasers:
  - fullName, email, instagram
  - ticketRange (coupon codes)
  - purchaseDate

When status=COMPLETED:
вҖў Returns winner details:
  - winner object: couponCode, fullName, email, instagram
  - drawDate, totalTickets, ticketsSold

For status=DRAFT:
вҖў Returns minimal data: id, title, bannerImage, status, createdAt

Get overview statistics for the giveaways dashboard.

========================================
рҹ“Ҡ RETURNS
========================================

вҖў **totalRevenue:** Sum of revenue from all ACTIVE giveaways (COMPLETED orders only)
вҖў **totalTicketsSold:** Sum of tickets sold across all ACTIVE giveaways
вҖў **totalTicketsAvailable:** Sum of total available tickets across all ACTIVE giveaways
вҖў **activeGiveawaysCount:** Number of ACTIVE giveaways
вҖў **upcomingDraws:** Array of ACTIVE giveaways sorted by days remaining (closest first)
  - id, title, drawDate, daysRemaining
  - ticketsSold, totalTickets

========================================
вң… EXAMPLE RESPONSE
========================================

{
  "message": "Giveaways overview stats retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "totalRevenue": 45200.50,
    "totalTicketsSold": 850,
    "totalTicketsAvailable": 1000,
    "activeGiveawaysCount": 1,
    "upcomingDraws": [
      {
        "id": "uuid-1",
        "title": "Bathroom Renovation Giveaway",
        "drawDate": "2026-05-10T00:00:00Z",
        "daysRemaining": 12,
        "ticketsSold": 850,
        "totalTickets": 1000
      }
    ]
  }
}

Get a single giveaway by ID with all details.

Returns:
вҖў All giveaway info
вҖў Ticket packages
вҖў Stats (if ACTIVE):
  - totalRevenue: Sum of COMPLETED orders
  - totalSales: Count of COMPLETED orders
  - salesProgress: Percentage (0-100%)
  - totalEmails: Count of unique customer emails
  - dailyAverageSales: totalSales / days_since_created
  - conversionRate: (totalSales / totalTickets) * 100
вҖў Recent 3 purchasers (if ACTIVE):
  - fullName, email, instagram

formdata.description: Update status to ACTIVE to publish the giveaway. Returns 409 error if another active giveaway exists.

request.description: Update giveaway details. All fields are optional. Can update title, description, totalTickets, drawDate, drawTime, bannerImage (file upload), status, and packages. If packages are provided, all existing packages will be replaced with the new ones. Set status='ACTIVE' to publish a draft - returns 409 error if another active giveaway exists.

рҹ”ҙ WRITE OPERATION - Automatically draw a random winner and save to database.

This is a POST request because it modifies the database:
вҖў Randomly selects a winner from VALID coupons
вҖў Sets giveaway status to COMPLETED
вҖў Persists winnerCouponId to database

========================================
рҹҺ° PROCESS
========================================

1. Retrieves all VALID coupons for the giveaway
2. Randomly selects one winner (cryptographically secure)
3. Updates giveaway in database:
   - Sets winnerCouponId
   - Sets status to COMPLETED
4. Returns giveaway with winner details

========================================
вң… SUCCESS RESPONSE (200)
========================================

{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Winner drawn successfully",
  "data": {
    "giveaway": {
      "id": "uuid-1",
      "title": "вӮ¬10,000 Cash Giveaway",
      "status": "COMPLETED",
      "winnerCouponId": "coupon-id",
      "winnerCoupon": {...},
      ...
    },
    "winner": {
      "couponCode": "GW-A1B2C3-042",
      "fullName": "John Doe",
      "email": "john@example.com",
      "instagram": "@john_builds"
    }
  }
}

========================================
вқҢ ERROR RESPONSES
========================================

вқҢ 404 - Giveaway not found
вқҢ 400 - No valid coupons available
  (All coupons have been marked as VOID)
вқҢ 500 - Server error

========================================
рҹ’Ў USAGE
========================================

1. Admin clicks "Draw Winner" button
2. System randomly selects from valid coupons
3. Winner saved in database (winnerCouponId)
4. Giveaway marked as COMPLETED
5. Winner details returned to frontend

Manually select winner by providing a valid coupon code.

========================================
рҹ“Ӣ REQUEST BODY
========================================

{
  "couponCode": "GW-A1B2C3-042"
}

========================================
рҹ”Қ VALIDATION
========================================

1. **Coupon must exist:** Returns 404 if coupon code not found
2. **Must belong to giveaway:** Returns 400 if coupon belongs to different giveaway
3. **Must be VALID:** Returns 400 if coupon status is VOID
4. **No duplicate winners:** Only one winner can be selected per giveaway

========================================
вң… SUCCESS RESPONSE (200)
========================================

{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Winner selected successfully",
  "data": {
    "giveaway": {
      "id": "uuid-1",
      "title": "вӮ¬10,000 Cash Giveaway",
      "status": "COMPLETED",
      "winnerCouponId": "coupon-id",
      "winnerCoupon": {...},
      ...
    },
    "winner": {
      "couponCode": "GW-A1B2C3-042",
      "fullName": "John Doe",
      "email": "john@example.com",
      "instagram": "@john_builds"
    }
  }
}

========================================
вқҢ ERROR RESPONSES
========================================

вқҢ 400 - Missing couponCode in body
вқҢ 404 - Coupon not found
вқҢ 400 - Coupon does not belong to this giveaway
вқҢ 400 - Coupon is not valid (VOID status)
вқҢ 500 - Server error

========================================
рҹ’Ў USAGE
========================================

1. Admin searches for participant coupon code
2. Enters coupon code in request body
3. System validates and selects winner
4. Giveaway status changes to COMPLETED
5. Winner announced

========================================
рҹ“қ HOW TO FIND COUPON CODES
========================================

1. Go to Entry Details Preview
2. Find participant ticket number (e.g., #482-485)
3. Extract coupon code from ticket range
4. Send in this endpoint as couponCode parameter
Delete a giveaway and all its ticket packages.

item.name: vouchers

request.description:
Create a new voucher using form-data.

FORM-DATA FIELDS:
вҖў code (text) - Unique voucher code (e.g., 'AMBER-FALL-27')
вҖў discountType (text) - 'PERCENTAGE' or 'FLAT'
вҖў discountValue (text) - Number: 1-100 for PERCENTAGE, currency amount for FLAT
вҖў usageLimit (text) - Maximum number of times voucher can be used
вҖў expirationDate (text) - ISO date format (e.g., '2026-12-31')
вҖў status (text) - 'DRAFT' or 'ACTIVE' (default: ACTIVE)

RESPONSE:
вң… 201 - Voucher created successfully
вқҢ 409 - Voucher with this code already exists (user-friendly error message)
вқҢ 400 - Validation error (e.g., PERCENTAGE > 100)

USAGE TRACKING:
usedCount starts at 0 and increments with each order, auto-expires when usedCount >= usageLimit.

query.description: Filter by status: DRAFT, ACTIVE, or EXPIRED (optional)

request.description: Get paginated list of vouchers. Returns code, discount details, usage stats, and status. Use status query parameter to filter (DRAFT, ACTIVE, EXPIRED). Remove status to get all.

Get voucher overview/statistics for the admin dashboard.

========================================
рҹ“Ҡ RETURNS
========================================

вҖў **totalDiscountsApplied:** Sum of all discount amounts from orders that used vouchers (calculated from: package.price - order.totalAmount)
вҖў **activeVouchers:** Count of vouchers with ACTIVE status
вҖў **totalVouchers:** Count of all vouchers (DRAFT, ACTIVE, EXPIRED)
вҖў **ordersUsingVouchers:** Count of orders that applied vouchers
вҖў **averageDiscountPerOrder:** Average discount amount per order
вҖў **topActiveVouchers:** Last 5 recent active vouchers with usage details (id, code, discountType, discountValue, usedCount, usageLimit, expirationDate, order count)

========================================
вң… EXAMPLE RESPONSE
========================================

{
  "message": "Voucher overview retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "totalDiscountsApplied": 12450.00,
    "activeVouchers": 18,
    "totalVouchers": 24,
    "ordersUsingVouchers": 156,
    "averageDiscountPerOrder": 79.81,
    "topActiveVouchers": [
      {
        "id": "uuid-1",
        "code": "SAVE20",
        "discountType": "PERCENTAGE",
        "discountValue": "20",
        "usedCount": 45,
        "usageLimit": 100,
        "expirationDate": "2026-12-31T00:00:00Z",
        "_count": {
          "orders": 45
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

========================================
рҹ’Ў USE CASE
========================================
Use this endpoint to populate dashboard cards:
- "Total Discounts Applied" card: Use totalDiscountsApplied
- "Active Vouchers" card: Use activeVouchers
- Display top performing vouchers in a table
Get a single voucher by ID with detailed usage information including all orders that used this voucher.

Update voucher details using form-data. All fields are optional.

FORM-DATA FIELDS (аҰёаҰ¬ аҰҗаҰҡа§ҚаҰӣаҰҝаҰ•):
вҖў code (text) - Update voucher code
вҖў discountType (text) - 'PERCENTAGE' or 'FLAT'
вҖў discountValue (text) - Number: 1-100 for PERCENTAGE, currency amount for FLAT
вҖў usageLimit (text) - Update maximum usage limit
вҖў expirationDate (text) - Update expiration date (ISO format: '2027-01-31')
вҖў status (text) - 'DRAFT', 'ACTIVE', or 'EXPIRED'

URL PARAMETERS:
:voucherId - UUID of the voucher to update

RESPONSE:
вң… 200 - Voucher updated successfully
вқҢ 409 - Voucher with this code already exists (when changing code)
вқҢ 404 - Voucher not found

item.name: leads

query.description: Filter by status: PENDING, CONTACTED, COMPLETED, QUOTED, CLOSED (optional)

request.description:
Get all leads with optional status filter (Admin only).

========================================
рҹ”Қ QUERY PARAMETERS (All Optional)
========================================

status - Filter leads by status. Valid values:
  вҖў PENDING - New leads not yet contacted
  вҖў CONTACTED - Leads that have been contacted
  вҖў QUOTED - Leads with quote sent
  вҖў COMPLETED - Completed work
  вҖў CLOSED - Closed leads (won't proceed)

Example:
  GET /api/admin/leads?status=PENDING
  GET /api/admin/leads?status=CONTACTED
  GET /api/admin/leads  (no filter, returns all)

========================================
вң… SUCCESS RESPONSE (200)
========================================

{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "fullName": "Jan de Vries",
      "email": "jan@example.nl",
      "phone": "+31612345678",
      "serviceType": "Dakdekkersdiensten",  // Dutch name
      "address": "Kouwstraat 121, Amsterdam",
      "projectDetails": "Project description...",
      "referenceImages": [
        "http://localhost:3000/uploads/lead-123.jpg"
      ],
      "status": "PENDING",
      "createdAt": "2026-04-28T10:30:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-04-28T10:30:00.000Z"
    }
  ]
}

========================================
рҹ“Ӣ RESPONSE DETAILS
========================================

вҖў Ordered by creation date (newest first)
вҖў serviceType returned in Dutch (e.g., 'Dakdekkersdiensten')
вҖў referenceImages are absolute URLs
вҖў Empty array [] if no leads found

========================================
рҹ“Ҡ STATUS VALUES REFERENCE
========================================

PENDING вҶ’ New lead, awaiting contact
CONTACTED вҶ’ First contact made
QUOTED вҶ’ Quote/estimate sent
COMPLETED вҶ’ Work finished successfully
CLOSED вҶ’ Lead closed (declined/not interested)

========================================
рҹ’Ў FRONTEND USAGE
========================================

вҖў Use for lead dashboard/list view
вҖў Filter by status to show different tabs
вҖў Display newest leads first
вҖў Show status with color coding

Get a single lead by ID with complete details.

URL PARAMETERS:
:id - Lead UUID

RETURNS:
вҖў Complete lead object with all fields
вҖў ServiceType in Dutch
вҖў Reference images array

RESPONSE:
вң… 200 - Lead details
вқҢ 404 - Lead not found

Update lead status (change lead workflow state).

вҡ пёҸ IMPORTANT: Admin inputs status in Dutch. Backend also accepts English for backward compatibility.

========================================
рҹ“Ӣ VALID STATUS VALUES (Dutch / English)
========================================

1. In afwachting / PENDING
   в””в”Җ New lead, not yet contacted
   в””в”Җ Default status when lead is submitted
   в””в”Җ Use this when lead needs follow-up

2. Gecontacteerd / CONTACTED
   в””в”Җ First contact made with customer
   в””в”Җ Initial call/email sent
   в””в”Җ Customer is aware of the lead

3. Geoffreerd / QUOTED
   в””в”Җ Quote/estimate sent to customer
   в””в”Җ Pricing provided
   в””в”Җ Waiting for customer decision

4. Voltooid / COMPLETED
   в””в”Җ Work completed successfully
   в””в”Җ Customer satisfied
   в””в”Җ Project finished

5. Gesloten / CLOSED
   в””в”Җ Lead closed without work
   в””в”Җ Customer declined or not interested
   в””в”Җ Won't proceed with this lead

========================================
рҹ“Ҡ TYPICAL STATUS FLOW
========================================

In afwachting вҶ’ Gecontacteerd вҶ’ Geoffreerd вҶ’ Voltooid
                                             вҶ“
                                          Gesloten

========================================
рҹ“қ REQUEST BODY (Raw JSON)
========================================

Recommended - Dutch (admin sends):
{
  "status": "Gecontacteerd"
}

Also accepted - English (backward compatibility):
{
  "status": "CONTACTED"
}

Both work! Backend converts to English вҶ’ stores вҶ’ returns Dutch

========================================
рҹ”— URL PARAMETERS
========================================

:id - Lead UUID (required)

========================================
вң… SUCCESS RESPONSE (200)
========================================

{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Lead status updated successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "status": "Gecontacteerd",  // вҶҗ Always returned in Dutch
    "fullName": "Jan de Vries",
    "email": "jan@example.nl",
    "phone": "+31612345678",
    "serviceType": "Dakdekkersdiensten",  // вҶҗ Also in Dutch
    "address": "Kouwstraat 121, Amsterdam",
    "projectDetails": "...",
    "referenceImages": ["http://..."],
    "createdAt": "2026-04-28T...",
    "updatedAt": "2026-04-28T..."
  }
}

========================================
вқҢ ERROR RESPONSES
========================================

400 - Invalid status value:
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "Ongeldige status: INVALID_STATUS"
}

400 - Missing status:
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "Status is required"
}

404 - Lead not found:
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "Lead not found"
}

========================================
рҹ’Ў FRONTEND USAGE TIPS
========================================

вҖў Use dropdown/select with Dutch status values (recommended)
вҖў Backend accepts both English and Dutch
вҖў Response always returns Dutch for frontend display
вҖў Show status flow visualization to users
вҖў Display status with color coding:
  - In afwachting (PENDING): Yellow/Orange
  - Gecontacteerd (CONTACTED): Blue
  - Geoffreerd (QUOTED): Purple
  - Voltooid (COMPLETED): Green
  - Gesloten (CLOSED): Red/Gray

request.description:
Bulk upload leads from CSV or Excel file (Admin only).

========================================
рҹ“Ӣ FILE FORMAT (CSV or XLSX)
========================================

Supported formats:
вҖў CSV (.csv) - Comma-separated values
вҖў XLSX (.xlsx) - Microsoft Excel format (recommended)

вҡ пёҸ IMPORTANT: Column Order Must Be Exact!

The file MUST have these columns in this EXACT ORDER:

в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ COLUMN ORDER (Left to Right in Excel/CSV)              в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 1. fullName        (Column A - Required)               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 2. email           (Column B - Required)               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 3. phone           (Column C - Required)               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 4. serviceType     (Column D - Required)               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 5. address         (Column E - Required)               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 6. projectDetails  (Column F - Optional)               в”Ӯ

========================================
рҹ“Ҙ UPLOAD REQUIREMENTS
========================================

вҖў File format: CSV (.csv) or Excel (.xlsx)
вҖў Maximum file size: 25MB

========================================

Common errors:

вҖў Invalid status (must be English: PENDING/CONTACTED/QUOTED/COMPLETED/CLOSED or Dutch: In afwachting/Gecontacteerd/Geoffreerd/Voltooid/Gesloten)

========================================
рҹ’Ў FRONTEND USAGE TIPS
========================================

1. Provide template CSV download
2. Show service type dropdown/list
3. Validate CSV before upload (optional)
4. Show progress during upload
5. Display success/failure summary
6. Allow retry for failed rows
7. Highlight row numbers with errors

========================================
рҹ“Ҡ WORKFLOW
========================================

1. Admin downloads template CSV
2. Admin fills Excel/CSV with lead data (with optional status column)
3. Admin uploads CSV or XLSX via this endpoint
4. Backend validates each row
5. Creates leads with provided status (or PENDING if not specified)

========================================

вҖў Row numbers in errors start from 2 (row 1 is header)
вҖў Process continues even if some rows fail
вҖў Successful leads are created immediately

request.description:
Get all coupons grouped by participant email (Admin only).

This endpoint returns all participants who have purchased coupons, with their order details and coupon information.

вҡ пёҸ SUPPORTS FILTERING: Date range and status filters available via query parameters.

========================================
рҹ”Қ QUERY PARAMETERS (All Optional)
========================================

вҖў **startDate** (optional)
  - Format: YYYY-MM-DD (e.g., 2023-10-01)
  - Filters orders from this date onwards (inclusive)
  - Example: ?startDate=2023-10-01

вҖў **endDate** (optional)
  - Format: YYYY-MM-DD (e.g., 2023-10-31)
  - Filters orders up to this date (inclusive, includes full day)
  - Example: ?endDate=2023-10-31

вҖў **status** (optional)
  - Values: COMPLETED or REFUNDED
  - Filters by order payment status
  - Default: Both COMPLETED and REFUNDED
  - Example: ?status=COMPLETED

рҹ“Ӣ **Filter Examples:**

1. All orders in October 2023:
   GET /api/admin/coupons?startDate=2023-10-01&endDate=2023-10-31

2. Only completed (paid) orders:
   GET /api/admin/coupons?status=COMPLETED

3. Completed orders in date range:
   GET /api/admin/coupons?startDate=2023-10-01&endDate=2023-10-31&status=COMPLETED

4. Orders from specific date onwards:
   GET /api/admin/coupons?startDate=2023-10-12

5. Orders up to specific date:
   GET /api/admin/coupons?endDate=2023-10-15

========================================
рҹ“Ҡ RESPONSE STRUCTURE
========================================

Returns participants grouped by email, each showing:
вҖў Email address (unique identifier)
вҖў Full name
вҖў Phone number
вҖў Instagram username
вҖў Initials (first letters of name)
вҖў Total orders count
вҖў Total coupons purchased
вҖў Total amount spent
вҖў Array of all orders with coupon details

========================================
рҹ“Ӣ PARTICIPANT DATA
========================================

Each participant object contains:

1. **Basic Info:**
   - email: Participant email address
   - fullName: Participant full name
   - phone: Phone number
   - instagram: Instagram username
   - initials: First letters of name (e.g., "MW" for Marcus Wright)

2. **Summary:**
   - totalOrders: Number of orders placed
   - totalCoupons: Total coupons purchased across all orders
   - totalSpent: Total amount spent (вӮ¬)

3. **Orders Array:**
   Each order contains:
   - orderId: Order UUID
   - giveawayName: Name of the giveaway
   - purchaseDate: When the order was placed
   - quantity: Number of coupons in this order
   - totalPrice: Order amount (вӮ¬)
   - status: COMPLETED or REFUNDED
   - couponCodes: Array of coupon codes (e.g., ["GW-A1B2C3-001", "GW-A1B2C3-002"])

========================================

Vouchers

request.description:
Validate a voucher code (PUBLIC - No authentication required).

REQUEST BODY (Raw JSON):
{
  "code": "AMBER-FALL-27",
  "orderAmount": 500
}

FIELDS:
вҖў code (string) - Voucher code to validate
вҖў orderAmount (number) - Total order amount before discount

CHECKS:
1. Voucher exists and is ACTIVE
2. Not expired (expirationDate > now)
3. Has remaining uses (usedCount < usageLimit)

RETURNS:
вҖў voucherCode - Same code (send this when creating order, NOT an ID)
вҖў discountAmount - Amount of discount
вҖў finalAmount - Order amount after discount
вҖў remainingUses - How many uses left

IMPORTANT:
вң… This endpoint only PREVIEWS the discount
вқҢ Does NOT consume the voucher (usedCount stays the same)

VOUCHER CONSUMPTION:
Happens automatically server-side when:
1. Customer completes payment
2. Frontend sends voucherCode (not ID) to order endpoint
3. Backend validates, creates order, and consumes voucher automatically

No need to call this API again after payment!

request.description:
Create order and get Stripe checkout URL.

REQUEST BODY (Raw JSON):
{
  "packageId": "uuid-from-giveaway",
  "voucherCode": "AMBER-FALL-24",  // OPTIONAL
  "fullName": "John Doe",
  "email": "john@example.com",
  "phone": "+31612345678",
  "instagramUsername": "johndoe"  // OPTIONAL
}

REQUIRED FIELDS:
вҖў packageId - Get from active giveaway packages
вҖў fullName - Customer full name
вҖў email - Customer email
вҖў phone - Customer phone number

OPTIONAL FIELDS:
вҖў voucherCode - Promo code for discount
вҖў instagramUsername - Customer Instagram handle

RETURNS:
вҖў orderId - Order reference ID
вҖў sessionId - Stripe session ID
вҖў paymentUrl - Redirect user to this URL for payment вҶҗ IMPORTANT!
вҖў totalAmount - Final amount after discount
вҖў originalAmount - Price before discount
вҖў discountAmount - Amount saved

NEXT STEPS:
1. Redirect user to paymentUrl
2. User completes payment on Stripe hosted page
3. Stripe redirects back to success_url with session_id
4. Call Confirm Order endpoint with session_id

RESPONSE:
вң… 201 - Order created, redirect to paymentUrl
вқҢ 400 - Invalid package/voucher or not enough tickets

NOTE: Order status is PENDING until payment confirmed

Confirm payment and complete order. Generates individual coupons.

REQUEST BODY (Raw JSON):
{
  "sessionId": "cs_test_xxxxxxxxxxxxx"
}

FIELDS:
вҖў sessionId - From Stripe success_url query parameter

WHEN TO CALL:
After user completes payment on Stripe, they are redirected to:
`http://localhost:3001/order/success?session_id=cs_test_xxx&order_id=uuid`

Extract session_id from URL and call this endpoint.

WHAT HAPPENS:
1. Verifies payment with Stripe API
2. Updates order status to COMPLETED
3. Generates individual coupons (e.g., 20 coupons for 20-ticket package)
4. Increments voucher usage (if voucher used)
5. Increments giveaway ticketsSold
6. Updates user totalSpent

COUPON GENERATION:
вҖў If package has 1 coupon вҶ’ generates 1 Coupon record
вҖў If package has 20 coupons вҶ’ generates 20 Coupon records
вҖў Each coupon gets unique code: GW-XXXXXX-001, GW-XXXXXX-002, etc.
вҖў More coupons = more entries in draw = better chance of winning!

RETURNS:
вҖў Complete order details
вҖў All generated coupons with unique codes
вҖў Updated giveaway stats

RESPONSE:
вң… 200 - Payment confirmed, coupons generated
вқҢ 400 - Session not found, already completed, or payment not successful

NOTE: Each coupon is a separate entry in the giveaway draw

Get order details with all coupons.

URL PARAMETERS:
:orderId - Order UUID

RETURNS:
вҖў Complete order information
вҖў Package details
вҖў Giveaway details
вҖў Voucher details (if used)
вҖў User information
вҖў All generated coupons (if order completed)

USE CASE:
вҖў Check order status
вҖў View purchased coupons
вҖў Order confirmation page
вҖў Customer support

RESPONSE:
вң… 200 - Order details retrieved
вқҢ 404 - Order not found
